## Describe the bug

A clear description of what's broken.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- Device: [e.g. iPhone 14, desktop]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 126, Safari 17]
- Viewport: [e.g. mobile, tablet, desktop]
- Online/offline: [was the app online or offline when this happened?]

## Additional context

Anything else worth noting (e.g. specific location/slug, alert severity, network conditions).
